title: hippocrepis liouvillei subsp. genuina
intro: Hippocrepis liouvillei subsp. genuina, commonly known as the French Saint's-herb or False Lupin, is a plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties that have been used to treat various health conditions, including inflammation, fever, and respiratory issues. The plant's extracts have been found to possess antimicrobial, antioxidant, and anti-inflammatory properties, which contribute to its health benefits such as reducing oxidative stress, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Hippocrepis liouvillei subsp. genuina is typically prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil for medicinal use.
